rulings.Case Title: 415 TWENTY SEVENTH STREET LLC. VS. JOHN KAHLER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 16, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT JOHN KAHLER, CHARLENE KAHLER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to October 30, 2019. The Court is inclined to take the judicial notice of both Notices of Intent on file with the Rent Board as to their existence and their legal effect. By no later that October 21, 2019 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief addressing: (1) legal sufficiency of the original NOI; (2) whether original NOI triggered the 120 days/1 year termination; and (3) whether second NOI is intended to cure the original NOI, and if so under what legal authority; and (4) whether new NOI is intended as a standalone NOI, and if so under what legal authority its filing is timely and legally proper. Defendant to file a supplemental brief no later than October 25, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 415 TWENTY SEVENTH STREET LLC. VS. WILLIAM KAHLER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 16, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT WILLIAM KAHLER, CORA KAHLER, BEVERLY KAHLER, CHRISTOPHER JACINDO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to October 30, 2019. The Court is inclined to take the judicial notice of both Notices of Intent on file with the Rent Board as to their existence and their legal effect. By no later that October 21, 2019 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief addressing: (1) legal sufficiency of the original NOI; (2) whether original NOI triggered the 120 days/1 year termination; and (3) whether second NOI is intended to cure the original NOI, and if so under what legal authority; and (4) whether new NOI is intended as a standalone NOI, and if so under what legal authority its filing is timely and legally proper. Defendant to file a supplemental brief no later than October 25, 2019. = (501/CFH)
